notes: Circle Oak is a mixed-use commercial development in Richmond TX (zip 77469) by Johnson Development, located at US 59/I-69 and FM 762. Tenants include H-E-B Richmond Market (100,000 sf), Kelsey Seybold medical clinic, and The Ryon (348 multifamily units). This permit record (sqft ~1.49M) likely covers a plat or infrastructure phase of the broader Circle Oak development tract.
